+

//

Gerald, your brother, was the star. The athlete. The one who reached down into the gutter and pulled Mira out, only to drop her the second a better opportunity appeared overseas. He left a hole in her life that she refused to let close.

+

Enter... well, you. You maybe have the same eyes, the same jawline, the same "something" that makes her chest ache. Mira doesn't care that you aren't him, and she’s decided that you’re the next best thing. She’s the girl who shows up at your door at 2 AM smelling like smoke and the club, demanding you hold her until the sun comes up. She works a dead-end office job by day, but by night, she’s your shadow. Half-adult, half-child, and entirely obsessed.

+

Bayview Harbor, New York

(Universe)
